title: Backup restore rehearsal
body: How to create, verify, and restore an AuraDB backup into a fresh data directory before a release.

title: Verify backup integrity
body: Checksum and verify a backup archive before you restore it so a corrupt backup is caught early.

title: Snapshot create and restore
body: Create a snapshot and restore it into a fresh data directory to rehearse recovery on a single node.

title: Replication leader election
body: How the multi-node preview elects a leader and lets followers catch up to the committed log.

title: Follower read staleness
body: Bounded staleness when reading from a follower in the high-availability preview while the leader commits writes.

title: Cluster bootstrap
body: Bootstrap a three-node cluster and join peers so the replication preview can elect a leader.

title: BM25 text ranking
body: Okapi BM25 relevance ranking with the k1 term-saturation and b length-normalization tuning parameters.

title: Hybrid search fusion
body: Combine BM25 text relevance with exact vector similarity and fuse the two signals into one ranked result.

title: Exact vector nearest neighbour
body: Exact cosine nearest-neighbour vector search is the correctness baseline for ranked similarity queries.

title: Storage compaction
body: Compact segments and reclaim disk space while garbage collection removes superseded record versions.

title: Garbage collection of old versions
body: Reclaim space held by superseded MVCC versions so old data does not accumulate in the data directory.

title: Data directory layout
body: Segments, the manifest, and the catalog laid out on disk inside the AuraDB data directory.
